claimText: The Green Credit Program (GCP) is established under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.
evidenceExcerpt: The Green Credit Program is an innovative market-based mechanism established under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986
examUse: Statement-based question testing the statutory backing of the Green Credit Program.

claimText: The Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE) is the administering body for the Green Credit Program.
evidenceExcerpt: Administered by the Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE), Dehradun.
examUse: Institution-feature question identifying the administering authority of the program.
distractorHooks: Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority (CAMPA)

claimText: Under the revised tree plantation methodology, one Green Credit is equivalent to one new tree over 5 years old on degraded forest land with a minimum 40% canopy density.
evidenceExcerpt: Under the revised methodology for tree plantation, 1 Green Credit equals 1 new tree (over 5 years old) on degraded forest land with a minimum 40% canopy density.
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific valuation and criteria for earning Green Credits.
distractorHooks: 1 Green Credit equals 1 ton of CO2 sequestered
1 Green Credit equals 1 hectare of afforested land
Applies to trees that are 1 year old

claimText: Green Credits generated under the specific revised tree plantation methodology are non-tradable and non-transferable.
evidenceExcerpt: These specific credits are non-tradable and non-transferable.
examUse: Statement-based question testing the market features and tradability of specific Green Credits.
distractorHooks: Transferable to private corporations for CSR compliance
Freely tradable on domestic energy exchanges

claimText: Eligible land parcels for the Green Credit Program must be at least five hectares in size.
evidenceExcerpt: Identified land parcels for the program must be at least five hectares in size.
examUse: Statement-based question on the eligibility criteria for land under the Green Credit Program.
distractorHooks: No minimum size requirement for land parcels
